proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in feature_041 is associated with higher pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate linear regression of pfs_months on feature_041 gave slope=0.1765 months per unit, z=266.527, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in feature_025 is associated with lower pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate linear regression of pfs_months on feature_025 gave slope=-1.18967 months per unit, z=-83.99, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_036=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with feature_036=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.703 for feature_036=1 (n=27481) versus 5.055 for feature_036=0 (n=22519); difference=-1.352 months, two-sided normal/Welch p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_043=1 have higher mean pfs_months than patients with feature_043=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 5.089 for feature_043=1 (n=10022) versus 4.117 for feature_043=0 (n=39978); difference=0.9722 months, two-sided normal/Welch p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in feature_056 is associated with lower pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate linear regression of pfs_months on feature_056 gave slope=-0.07302 months per unit, z=-27.681, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in feature_050 is associated with higher pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate linear regression of pfs_months on feature_050 gave slope=0.46536 months per unit, z=22.875, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all other feature_* columns, feature_001=1 remains associated with lower pfs_months compared with feature_001=0.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS including all 73 feature_* columns estimated coefficient=-0.35437 months for feature_001, SE=0.00807, z=-43.937, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all other feature_* columns, feature_015=1 remains associated with lower pfs_months compared with feature_015=0.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS including all 73 feature_* columns estimated coefficient=-0.28655 months for feature_015, SE=0.00808, z=-35.477, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all other feature_* columns, a one-unit increase in feature_029 remains associated with lower pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS including all 73 feature_* columns estimated coefficient=-0.00501 months for feature_029, SE=0.00024, z=-20.998, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for all other feature_* columns, feature_066=1 remains associated with lower pfs_months compared with feature_066=0.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS including all 73 feature_* columns estimated coefficient=-0.35535 months for feature_066, SE=0.0189, z=-18.802, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint subgroup feature_001=1 and feature_043=1 has less favorable than additive pfs_months relative to the additive main effects of feature_001 and feature_043.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_043 + feature_001:feature_043 estimated interaction=-1.6288 months (difference-in-differences). Cell means: 00=4.117 (n=23286), 10=4.116 (n=16692), 01=5.773 (n=5816), 11=4.143 (n=4206); p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint subgroup feature_015=1 and feature_043=1 has less favorable than additive pfs_months relative to the additive main effects of feature_015 and feature_043.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model pfs_months ~ feature_015 + feature_043 + feature_015:feature_043 estimated interaction=-1.4541 months (difference-in-differences). Cell means: 00=4.121 (n=25819), 10=4.109 (n=14159), 01=5.601 (n=6524), 11=4.135 (n=3498); p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint subgroup feature_015=1 and feature_001=1 has more favorable than additive pfs_months relative to the additive main effects of feature_015 and feature_001.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model pfs_months ~ feature_015 + feature_001 + feature_015:feature_001 estimated interaction=0.4517 months (difference-in-differences). Cell means: 00=4.622 (n=18853), 10=4.128 (n=10249), 01=4.136 (n=13490), 11=4.094 (n=7408); p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint subgroup feature_066=1 and feature_043=1 has less favorable than additive pfs_months relative to the additive main effects of feature_066 and feature_043.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model pfs_months ~ feature_066 + feature_043 + feature_066:feature_043 estimated interaction=-1.1829 months (difference-in-differences). Cell means: 00=4.116 (n=38174), 10=4.126 (n=1804), 01=5.144 (n=9554), 11=3.971 (n=468); p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint subgroup feature_042=1 and feature_043=1 has more favorable than additive pfs_months relative to the additive main effects of feature_042 and feature_043.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model pfs_months ~ feature_042 + feature_043 + feature_042:feature_043 estimated interaction=0.988 months (difference-in-differences). Cell means: 00=4.117 (n=38785), 10=4.125 (n=1193), 01=5.058 (n=9709), 11=6.054 (n=313); p=1.20e-11.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint subgroup feature_018=1 and feature_048=1 has more favorable than additive pfs_months relative to the additive main effects of feature_018 and feature_048.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model pfs_months ~ feature_018 + feature_048 + feature_018:feature_048 estimated interaction=0.2324 months (difference-in-differences). Cell means: 00=4.318 (n=34738), 10=4.281 (n=6266), 01=4.279 (n=7602), 11=4.475 (n=1394); p=0.00165.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of feature_001=1 versus feature_001=0 on pfs_months is more negative when feature_043=1 than when feature_043=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_001=1 vs 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.0013 months when feature_043=0 and by -1.6301 months when feature_043=1; difference of simple effects=-1.6288 months, matching the interaction p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of feature_015=1 versus feature_015=0 on pfs_months is more negative when feature_043=1 than when feature_043=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_015=1 vs 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.0118 months when feature_043=0 and by -1.4659 months when feature_043=1; difference of simple effects=-1.4541 months, matching the interaction p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of feature_015=1 versus feature_015=0 on pfs_months is more positive when feature_001=1 than when feature_001=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_015=1 vs 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.4935 months when feature_001=0 and by -0.0418 months when feature_001=1; difference of simple effects=0.4517 months, matching the interaction p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of feature_066=1 versus feature_066=0 on pfs_months is more negative when feature_043=1 than when feature_043=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_066=1 vs 0 changed mean pfs_months by 0.0098 months when feature_043=0 and by -1.1731 months when feature_043=1; difference of simple effects=-1.1829 months, matching the interaction p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The slope of pfs_months with respect to feature_029 is more negative among patients with feature_043=1 than among patients with feature_043=0.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model with centered feature_029, feature_043, and their product estimated interaction slope=-0.02527 months per feature_029 unit, SE=0.00157, z=-16.045, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The slope of pfs_months with respect to feature_041 is more negative among patients with feature_036=1 than among patients with feature_036=0.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model with centered feature_041, feature_036, and their product estimated interaction slope=-0.00712 months per feature_041 unit, SE=0.00119, z=-6.008, p=1.89e-9.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The slope of pfs_months with respect to feature_029 is more positive among patients with feature_001=1 than among patients with feature_001=0.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model with centered feature_029, feature_001, and their product estimated interaction slope=0.00735 months per feature_029 unit, SE=0.00128, z=5.736, p=9.70e-9.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The two-way interaction between feature_015 and feature_001 in pfs_months is more positive when feature_043=1 than when feature_043=0.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model containing all main effects, two-way terms, and feature_015:feature_001:feature_043 estimated three-way interaction=2.3483 months, SE=0.1043, z=22.526, p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The two-way interaction between feature_001 and feature_043 in pfs_months is more positive when feature_015=1 than when feature_015=0.

analyses.result_summary: OLS model containing all main effects, two-way terms, and feature_001:feature_043:feature_015 estimated three-way interaction=2.3483 months, SE=0.1043, z=22.526, p=<1e-300.
